center.name: 愛德華·皮爾遜·拉姆齊
center.summary: 愛德華·皮爾遜·拉姆齊是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Finsch's pygmy parrot、Papuan king parrot、点斑猫鸟等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Gennaeodryas placens |article-number=e.T22704880A217500213 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-2.RLTS.T22704880A217500213.en}} | genus = Eopsaltria | species = placens | authority = Ramsay, E.P., 1879 | synonyms = *Poecilodryas placens *Gennaeodryas placens }} The banded yellow robin or olive-yellow robin (Eopsaltria placens) is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae that is found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Finsch's pygmy parrot (Micropsitta finschii), also known as the emerald pygmy parrot and green pygmy parrot, is a member of parrot family Psittaculidae inhabiting tropical rainforest regions of islands in Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands, and the Bismarck Archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan king parrot (Alisterus chloropterus), also known as the green-winged king parrot, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spotted catbird (Ailuroedus maculosus) is a species of bowerbird (Ptilonorhynchidae) which can be found in north Queensland, the eastern Moluccas and New Guinea.Higgins, P.J., Peter, J.M
